entry.title: PLS bc it won't matter to you tomorrow 😭 all the years of work and i almost got to 200k and now i'm scared this will end worldwide soon enough

entry.title: BUT FR i'm so sad for everyone in america:( i'll be putting all my videos onto yt shorts - mushr0fairy222again (🔗 in bio) so you won't miss anything from me!! #storytime #skit #pov
